entry.title: notice: under construction
entry.content:
Todo

[v] narrow page layout  
[v] uploading image and adjust size  
[v] LaTeX  
[v] Tag page  
[v] Category page
[v] Intro page  
[v] comment board
[v] SEO

test layout

dicom2jpg

dicom2jpg is a python package, which converts DICOM images to JPG/PNG/BMP/TIFFformats and to numpy.ndarray.

It piplines the lookup transformations by applying Modality LUT, VOI LUT, and Presentation LUT to the images, which makes the output files look like what we see on standard DICOM viewers.

dicom2jpg2

test2 ations by applying Modality LUT, VOI LUT, and Presentation LUT to the images,

line2 ations by applying Modality LUT, VOI LUT, and Presentation LUT to the images,

line3 ations by applying Modality LUT, VOI LUT, and Presentation LUT to the images,

title3 with p

​ test2 ations by applying Modality LUT, VOI LUT, and Presentation LUT to the images,

​ line2 ations by applying Modality LUT, VOI LUT, and Presentation LUT to the images,

​ line3 ations by applying Modality LUT, VOI LUT, and Presentation LUT to the images,

test layout2

dicom2jpg

核醫藥師於星期一上午 8 點整將 Mo-99/Tc-99m 孳生器內的 Tc-99m 完全流洗出來 使用，共得 100 mCi Tc-99m，之後到隔天上午 8 點整時再次流洗 Tc-99m 使用。 請問此時核醫藥師約可得到多少 Tc-99m?

    1. 6 mCi (B) 50 mCi (C) 78 mCi (D) 100 mci
    1. 常常呈現類似 Dementia with Lewy bodies
    1. 常常呈現特徵性的雙側 lateral temporal areas 低葡萄糖代謝現象
    1. 6 mCi (B) 50 mCi (C) 78 mCi (D) 100 mci
    1. 常常呈現類似 Dementia with Lewy bodies
    1. 常常呈現特徵性的雙側 lateral temporal areas 低葡萄糖代謝現象

核醫藥師於星期一上午 8 點整將 Mo-99/Tc-99m 孳生器內的 Tc-99m 完全流洗出來 使用，共得 100 mCi Tc-99m，之後到隔天上午 8 點整時再次流洗 Tc-99m 使用。 請問此時核醫藥師約可得到多少 Tc-99m?

test of the quote

  • inthe quote
    1. 6 mCi (B) 50 mCi (C) 78 mCi (D) 100 mci
    1. 常常呈現類似 Dementia with Lewy bodies
    1. 常常呈現特徵性的雙側 lateral temporal areas 低葡萄糖代謝現象

 

核醫藥師於星期一上午 8 點整將 Mo-99/Tc-99m 孳生器內的 Tc-99m 完全流洗出來 使用，共得 100 mCi Tc-99m，之後到隔天上午 8 點整時再次流洗 Tc-99m 使用。 請問此時核醫藥師約可得到多少 Tc-99m?

test of the quote

  • inthe quote
  • (A) 6 mCi (B) 50 mCi (C) 78 mCi (D) 100 mci
  • (B) 常常呈現類似 Dementia with Lewy bodies
  • (C) 常常呈現特徵性的雙側 lateral temporal areas 低葡萄糖代謝現象
